git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Both scripts were created in cycle 5 with bare integer literal 10 for flock timeout, violating Standard 2/9 no-hardcoded-values
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Replaced bare integer with named LOCK_TIMEOUT variable using env-override default pattern; value unchanged (10), but now externally configurable

self_verification.notes: All 6 acceptance criteria verified: bash -n exits 0 for both scripts; LOCK_TIMEOUT appears 3 times each; no bare flock -s -w 10 or flock -w 10 remaining

dev.qa_notes: Run acceptance criteria from docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-20260526-042454.json. Key checks: (1) bash -n on both scripts; (2) exactly one LOCK_TIMEOUT assignment before flock call in each; (3) no bare integer 10 in flock calls; (4) stderr messages use ${LOCK_TIMEOUT}s. score-update.sh is explicitly out of scope (pre-existing false positive).
